creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
farrokhi    2006-11-08 19:42:21 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/sjitter     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Sjitter is a command line client/server to measure jitter
  (based on RFC 1889), one way UDP delay and bandwidth.
  
  PR:             ports/104898
  Submitted by:   self
  Approved by:    miwi (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.94      +1 -0      ports/net-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/net-mgmt/sjitter/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net-mgmt/sjitter/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/net-mgmt/sjitter/pkg-descr (new)
